_description: Map ElevenLabs voice_id to local VoxCPM config. Path values are relative to tts_server/. If a voice_id is missing, the server falls back to REF_VOICE_PATH default voice mode.

TX3LPaxmHKxFdv7VOQHJ.ref_voice_text: A new Metro game just dropped its official reveal trailer, and nobody expected this franchise to return. Metro twenty 39 is officially happening. The reveal trailer just went live, showing what appears to be a deeply personal story centred on a protagonist grappling with a haunting past. Based on the trailer's tone and imagery, the narrative explores themes of indoctrination and trauma.
TX3LPaxmHKxFdv7VOQHJ.notes: Liam - local Pulse voice uses the longer Sleepy Empire Liam reference that already worked locally. The rejected pulse_v2 reference was too close to the older rushed/high-pitch local voice.

G17SuINrv2H9FC6nvetn.notes: Christopher - calm documentary narration, 85-95 WPM target. Needs 15-30s clean clone ref.
